content.full_text:
Dear Luisa Menchaca


This letter is in regard to our phone conversation on 11/06/92 at
0930 hours. I would appreciate a letter to be sent to me
regarding the issues we discussed regarding it my serving on a
special fire district board would be a conflict of interest,
being that I am employed with the California Department of
Forestry and Fire Protection.

Thank You

Rusty Souza
15632 W. E Street
Kerman, CA 93630
(209) 846-6736

Rusty Souza

sections.question: Would serving on a special fire district board constitute a conflict of interest given employment with the California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection?
sections.question_synthetic: The requester asks whether serving on a special fire district board would create a conflict of interest in light of their employment with the California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC response. The requester is asking for formal advice after a preliminary phone conversation. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections are present in standard format. The second half of the document appears to be scanner artifact or image quality issue with minimal content. Contact information provided but response/advice letter not included in this document.
